political.s: Limited direct political engagement found. Founder Bobbi Brown was appointed by President Obama to the Advisory Committee for Trade Policy and Negotiation. The brand itself shows minimal PAC/lobbying activity in available records.

charity.s: Strong commitment to women's empowerment. The Pretty Powerful Campaign launched in 2013 supports organizations including Dress for Success and She's the First, focusing on gender equality through education. Generated over £1,000,000 for Smart Works UK. Founder actively supports local initiatives in New Jersey.
charity.focus: Women's education, job training, gender equality

environment.s: Has set sustainability goals for 2025 including 75% recyclable/refillable packaging and 50% post-consumer recycled materials. Offsets 100% carbon emissions from US e-commerce orders. Parent company Estée Lauder demonstrates environmental commitment but brand is below-benchmark by some standards.

labor.s: Limited publicly available labor data. Brand operates as part of Estée Lauder Companies. States equal opportunity employment commitment. No significant OSHA violations or major labor disputes identified in available records.

dei.s: Pro-DEI positioning through Pretty Powerful Campaign focusing on women and girls. Parent company and brand show commitment to diversity in marketing and representation. Campaigns feature diverse ages, skin tones, and body types.

animals.s: Not cruelty-free. Company tests products where required by law, including China where animal testing is mandated for imported cosmetics. Sells in mainland China where animal testing remains legally required. Not certified by PETA or Leaping Bunny.

guns.s: No involvement in firearms industry. Cosmetics and beauty products company.

privacy.s: Has comprehensive privacy policy with consumer data rights (access, deletion, withdrawal of consent). Uses SSL encryption for online orders. Faced class action lawsuit regarding virtual try-on tool biometric data collection (dismissed in 2024). Maintains data transfer agreements for international processing.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
